test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: verifier reran bash cicd/tests/run-validations.sh and GITHUB_ACTIONS=true bash cicd/scripts/run-validations.sh cicd/config/validation-config.yml, and the updated tests explicitly validate stdout/stderr channel behavior for Actions and non-Actions warning-only runs.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: cicd/docs/cicd.md and cicd/tests/README.md describe human-readable warnings on stderr, GitHub Actions annotations on stdout only when GITHUB_ACTIONS=true, and no annotation token when GITHUB_ACTIONS is unset.
